ngo.name: Safe Harbor DV Services
ngo.mission_statement: Safe Harbor DV Services provides emergency shelter, legal advocacy, counseling, and community support services to survivors of domestic violence and their children. We operate confidential shelters and believe every person deserves to live free from abuse.

findings.title: API response leaking shelter facility GPS coordinates and addresses
findings.description: The /api/shelters/nearby endpoint returns the full GPS coordinates, street addresses, and capacity information for all shelter facilities in the system — including confidential emergency shelters. This endpoint requires no authentication and can be queried by anyone. If an abuser discovered this endpoint, they could locate survivors in your confidential shelters, putting lives at immediate risk.
findings.evidence_summary: Unauthenticated GET request to /api/shelters/nearby?lat=37.7749&lng=-122.4194&radius=100 returned JSON with 7 shelter facilities including GPS coordinates accurate to 6 decimal places and full street addresses including unit numbers.
